title: Implicit Fractional Differential Equations in Banach Spaces via Picard and Weakly Picard Operator Theory
author_string: Sagar T. Sutar, Kishor D. Kucche
abstract: In this paper, by employing fixed-point methods, we obtain the existence and uniqueness results for the nonlinear implicit fractional differential equations in Banach spaces. Further, we obtain the uniqueness, dependence of the solution on the initial condition as well as on the functions involved on the right-hand side by means of Picard and weakly Picard operator theory and Pompeiu--Hausdorff functional.
